meaning: 雅罗斯拉夫尔[苏联西部城市](在伏尔加河畔)
examples: Several years ago the Museum of copeck was opened in Yaroslavl.
The first private railway appeared in Russia in 1991 in the Yaroslavl region.
The ministry said the plane was carrying the Lokomotiv ice hockey team from Yaroslavl.
The Yaroslavl Lokomotiv hockey team, ranked No. 3 in the Russian KHL hockey league last year, lost all but one member.
World ice hockey chief Rene Fasel said the crash in Yaroslavl was "the darkest day in the history of our sport".
